challenge_target_inferred_from_public_hi.method: Mode among finisher rows with percent_completed >= 0.999; falls back to length_completed / percent_completed if needed.

limitations: The public history API does not include historical trail geometries or per-segment official membership.
Raw public history rows include participant identifiers/profile image URLs and are intentionally not copied into this year folder.

events: 2024-06-18 Heroes Trail access and Bogus Basin XC construction
known_challenge_change_events.interpretation: These events can cause final public challenge accounting to differ from static planner-era files.
